title: nuthatch eval report (RFC-0016 §1, Tier B)
description: Every published agent-eval number traces to a document conforming to this schema. Hand-typed scores are forbidden; the report is generated by the keyed runner. CI validates the schema even when the run itself is skipped (no key present).

date.description: ISO-8601 date the run was produced.

commit.description: The nuthatch commit the surface was evaluated at.

model.description: The exact model id the agent ran (a score is a number about a pairing, not a universal constant).

question_set_hash.description: Hash of questions.toml, so a score is pinned to the exact questions.

runs.description: Number of repeats the medians are taken over (>=3 for a published headline).

mean_sql_attempts.description: Mean SQL attempts per question - the S3 (errors-as-prompts) success metric.

by_class.description: Optional per-class breakdown of overall pass rate.

first_try.description: Passed on the agent's first SQL attempt.
